nodes.label: global.d.ts Configuration Decision
nodes.rationale: Using triple-slash references keeps the default TypeScript setting of accepting type information from the entire workspace, while also adding svelte and vite/client type information, rather than shutting out other types with compilerOptions.types.

nodes.label: allowJs TypeScript Option Decision
nodes.rationale: Enabling allowJs prevents worse typechecking for existing JS, allows JS syntax in .svelte files, and supports mixed codebases without enforcing strict false checks.

nodes.label: HMR Component State Preservation Decision
nodes.rationale: HMR state preservation is disabled by default due to surprising behavior and gotchas in svelte-hmr and @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte.

nodes.label: External Store for Component State
nodes.rationale: Create an external store to retain important state within a component across HMR updates, as the store is not replaced by HMR.
